description: App + SDK dependency updates. Dependabot (.github/dependabot.yml) covers GitHub Actions and Docker base images; Renovate owns the Bun lockfile, Python, and Go SDK deps, which Dependabot's npm ecosystem cannot update.

packageRules.description: Group all non-major app/workspace updates into one weekly PR
SDK dependencies get their own PRs — published packages, review individually
Security updates land immediately regardless of schedule
